refnamediv.refpurpose: Estimate camera pose from 3D and 2D point correspondences.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [rotationVector, translationVector] = imsolvepnp(objectPoints, imagePoints, cameraMatrix) [rotationVector, translationVector] = imsolvepnp(objectPoints, imagePoints, cameraMatrix, distortion)

listitem.para: N-by-2 matching image points as [x y].

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses OpenCV solvePnP to estimate a Rodrigues rotation vector and translation vector.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Function introduced with an OpenCV 5 gateway.
